title: Demon Slayer #DS
description: A Mod Pack That Give Us Ability To Become Demons And Slayers In Your Game Play And Have Fun.
body:
# DEMON SLAYER

**_note :- this modpack is maded using different public minecraft modes and resourcepack_**

this modpack is a Demon Slayer-themed survival pack designed to immerse you in the world of the anime Kimetsu no Yaiba, while providing essential performance boosts and visual upgrades.

Here is a breakdown of the modpack and its resources:

### 1. The Core Experience
Animated Kimetsu no Yaiba: This is the centerpiece of your modpack. It transforms Minecraft into the Demon Slayer world, adding Nichirin Swords, Breathing Styles (like Water, Flame, Thunder), Demons (including the Twelve Kizuki), and the Demon Slayer Corps uniform.

### 2. World & Mobs
More Mob Variants: Adds new breeds and texture variations to standard Minecraft mobs (e.g., different cat breeds, wolf variants, and skeleton types) to make the world feel more diverse.

Duck's Mobs: Likely adds ducks and potentially other small animals to the game for extra ambience.

Waystones: Allows you to build craftable pillars (Waystones) that you can teleport between, which is essential for traveling long distances in an RPG-style world.

Journey Map: Adds a minimap and a full-screen world map that auto-maps your world as you explore.

### 3. Performance & Technical
Sodium Dynamic Lights: A performance-friendly mod that makes lighting realistic—holding a torch in your hand will actually light up the area around you as you move.

GPUBooster: A technical mod that optimizes how your graphics card handles the game to increase FPS and reduce lag.

Fps Monitor: Adds a simple on-screen display (HUD) showing your frames per second so you can track performance.

BetterF3: Cleans up the debug screen (the F3 menu) to make it easier to read coordinates and biome info without the clutter.

### 4. Visuals & Resource
The resource packs included focus on two things: Atmosphere and Combat Visibility.

Dramatic Skys & Celestials Skies: These packs replace the blocky Minecraft sun and moon with realistic, high-resolution skies, clouds, and stars to make the anime scenery look epic.

Night Lights: Adds modern or decorative lighting blocks (like fairy lights) to give you more options for building aesthetic bases.

Low on Fire: A PvP/Utility pack that lowers the fire effect on your screen. Normally, being on fire blocks your vision; this reduces it so you can still fight effectively.

Low Shield: Lowers the shield model in your hand so it doesn't block half your screen when you aren't blocking.

**INCLUDES :-**
1. AKAZA
2. RENGOKU
3. SANAMI
4. ZENITSU
5. AND THEIR SWORDS

**please don't treat this modpack as your's
if you use this in your video refer me**
